items.headline: Geopolitical Tensions Drive Volatility Ahead of Market Open
items.summary: U.S. stock futures are showing mixed movements in pre-market trading, rebounding from earlier losses amid evolving prospects for a ceasefire in the Middle East. Escalating rhetoric regarding the Iran conflict has fueled uncertainty, keeping oil prices elevated. Investors are closely monitoring geopolitical developments and upcoming economic data releases this week, including Federal Reserve minutes and inflation figures, which are expected to influence market direction.

sections.title: Major Indices: Pre-Market & Last Week's Close

items.headline: Cheer Holding Rises on Reverse Stock Split
items.summary: Cheer Holding Inc. ($CHR) gained 9.4% to $0.87 in after-hours trading. The company announced a 1-for-3 reverse stock split effective April 6, aimed at maintaining its Nasdaq listing.

items.headline: Vivos Therapeutics Jumps on Investor Stake
items.summary: Vivos Therapeutics Inc. ($VVOS) shares jumped 21.2% to $1.60 in the after-hours session. This movement followed a Securities and Exchange Commission filing revealing a Michigan-based investor group acquired a 19.9% stake in the company.

items.headline: Quhuo Ltd. Sees Significant After-Hours Surge
items.summary: Quhuo Ltd. ($QH) shares surged 32.9% to $0.12 in after-hours trading, despite the company reporting an FY25 loss of 1 cent per share and a decrease in sales to $361.198 million from $417.420 million in the prior year.

items.headline: Broadcom Slips After CFO Announcement
items.summary: Broadcom Inc. ($AVGO) shares slipped 0.1% to $314.20 in the after-hours trading session. The movement followed the announcement of Amie Thuener as the new CFO, effective June 12.

items.headline: DeFi Technologies Up on Mixed Q4 Results
items.summary: DeFi Technologies Inc. ($DEFT) shares jumped 3.9% to $0.74 in after-hours trading. The company reported mixed fourth-quarter results, beating analyst EPS estimates but missing sales projections.

items.headline: US ISM Services Purchasing Managers' Index Due Today
items.summary: Today, April 6, 2026, the U.S. is scheduled to release its ISM Services Purchasing Managers' Index (PMI) at 14:00 GMT. This data assesses the health of the services sector, which constitutes approximately 80% of U.S. GDP.

items.headline: Key Economic Releases This Week: FOMC Minutes, PCE, and CPI
items.summary: The week ahead is packed with significant economic data. Investors will be keenly awaiting the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) March Minutes on Wednesday, the US Personal Consumption Expenditures (PCE) index on Thursday, and the crucial March Consumer Price Index (CPI) report on Friday. These releases will provide further insights into inflation and the Federal Reserve's monetary policy path.

items.headline: Earnings Reports for April 6, 2026
items.summary: Several companies are scheduled to report earnings today. These include Delta Air Lines, Inc. ($DAL) and RPM International, Inc. ($RPM) before market open, and Applied Digital Corporation ($APLD), Pricesmart Inc. ($PSMT), Resources Connection Inc. ($RGP), and Constellation Brands Inc. ($STZ) after market close. Additionally, CK Infrastructure ADR ($CKISY) also has an earnings report due.

items.headline: Energy Sector Maintains Strength Amid Geopolitical Concerns
items.summary: As of the end of March 2026, the Energy sector demonstrated the highest relative strength among large-cap sectors, a trend potentially exacerbated by ongoing geopolitical tensions in the Middle East, which have driven oil prices higher. In contrast, Financials lagged, while Communication Services, Technology, and Consumer Discretionary sectors experienced declines in the first quarter.

items.headline: Walmart's Advertising Business Boosts Profitability
items.summary: Walmart's advertising business has grown significantly, reaching $6.4 billion in fiscal year 2026, a 46% growth rate. This segment is becoming a key profit driver for the retail giant, influencing perspectives on the company's stock valuation due to its high profit margins.
